Taco Platter

author: Beth

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield:

Ingredients

  • 8 oz sour cream
  • 8 oz cream cheese
  • 1/2 pkg taco seasoning
  • 2 c. chopped lettuce
  • 8 oz cheddar cheese
  • 1 green pepper,
  • chopped 1 large tomato, chopped
  • 1 sm can sliced black olives

Directions

  1. Beat sour cream, cream cheese, and taco seasoning together. 2. Spread on platter.
  2. Top with veggies and cheese.
